title: Way Lower Shield
description: This texture pack makes shields sit much lower than in most other packs (maybe the lowest, not sure).
body:
# Lower Shield PvP Pack
This texture pack makes shields sit much lower than in most other packs (maybe the lowest, not fully sure). It was inspired by the Minecraft YouTuber **ManePear’s** texture packs, so I decided to create one myself.

## Compatibility
- Tested on: 1.21.4 – 1.20 (Main version: 1.21+)
- Other versions: not tested

## Requirements
- No mods required, this pack works on vanilla Minecraft.

## Credits
- Pack created entirely by **[_Melted](https://modrinth.com/user/_Melted)**.
- Inspired by **[ManePear](https://www.youtube.com/@ManePear)**.
